title: HarborPilot Platform Configuration
description: Schema for configs/platforms/<platform>.env files. Only fields that differ from configs/defaults/*.env need to be specified in a platform file.

PRODUCT_NAME.description: Unique identifier for the target platform. Used as image name prefix, container name, and SDK repo path. No spaces or special chars.

OS_DISTRIBUTION.description: Linux distribution for the base Docker image. Default: ubuntu (from configs/defaults/01_base.env).

OS_VERSION.description: Distribution version string used as the Docker image tag (e.g. ubuntu:${OS_VERSION}). Must match an available image tag.

IMAGE_NAME.description: Docker image name. Default: ${PRODUCT_NAME}-dev-env. Override only if you need a different naming convention.

PORT_SLOT.description: Port slot number for auto-calculating SSH and GDB host ports. Each platform must use a unique slot. Formula: SSH_PORT = 2109 + PORT_SLOT*10, GDB_PORT = 2345 + PORT_SLOT*10. Run 'scripts/create_platform.sh' to auto-assign the next available slot.

HARBOR_SERVER_IP.description: IP address of the Harbor container registry server.

HARBOR_SERVER_PORT.description: Port of the Harbor container registry server.

REGISTRY_URL.description: Full Harbor registry URL for push/pull. Default: ${HARBOR_SERVER_IP}:${HARBOR_SERVER_PORT}/team_${CONTAINER_NAME}. Override if your Harbor project naming differs.

HAVE_GITLAB_SERVER.description: Whether a GitLab server is available. If TRUE, also set GITLAB_SERVER_IP and GITLAB_SERVER_PORT.

GITLAB_SERVER_IP.description: GitLab server IP. Required if HAVE_GITLAB_SERVER=TRUE.

GITLAB_SERVER_PORT.description: GitLab server port. Required if HAVE_GITLAB_SERVER=TRUE.

SDK_INSTALL_PATH.description: Absolute path inside the container where the SDK will be cloned/installed.

SDK_GIT_REPO.description: Git SSH URL of the SDK repository.

SDK_GIT_KEY_FILE.description: Name of the SSH key file (without path) used to access the SDK repo. The key must be placed in the container's ~/.ssh/ directory.

SDK_GIT_DEFAULT_BRANCH.description: Default git branch to check out when cloning the SDK.

HOST_VOLUME_DIR.description: Absolute path on the HOST machine that is bind-mounted into the container as the persistent volume. Must exist on the host before running the container.

VOLUMES_ROOT.description: Path inside the container corresponding to HOST_VOLUME_DIR. Default: ${WORKSPACE_ROOT}/docker_volumes.

USE_NVIDIA_GPU.description: Enable NVIDIA GPU passthrough to the container (requires nvidia-docker2 on the host). Set to true only for platforms with a discrete NVIDIA GPU.

INSTALL_CUDA.description: Install CUDA toolkit inside the container. Requires USE_NVIDIA_GPU=true.

INSTALL_OPENCV.description: Build and install OpenCV from source inside the container.

INSTALL_HOST_CMAKE.description: Install cmake from the Ubuntu apt repository (host CMake for development). Set to false if you prefer a specific version installed via pip or manual download.

INSTALL_MAN_DOC.description: Install man pages and documentation. Set to false to reduce image size.

NPM_USE_CHINA_MIRROR.description: Use npmmirror.com (China) for Node.js download instead of nodejs.org. Set to true when building in China without a proxy.

HAS_PROXY.description: Whether to configure an HTTP/HTTPS proxy in the container. If true, also set HTTP_PROXY_IP and HTTPS_PROXY_IP.

HTTP_PROXY_IP.description: Full HTTP proxy URL. Required if HAS_PROXY=true.

HTTPS_PROXY_IP.description: Full HTTPS proxy URL. Required if HAS_PROXY=true. Usually same as HTTP_PROXY_IP.

INSTALL_SDK.description: Whether to clone and install the SDK during the Docker build. Set to true only when the build host has SSH access to the SDK git repo.

CONAN_VERSION.description: Conan C/C++ package manager version to install via pip.

CMAKE_FORMAT_VERSION.description: cmake-format (pip package) version. Set empty string to skip installation.

PRE_COMMIT_VERSION.description: pre-commit (pip package) version. Set empty string to skip installation.

CUDA_VERSION.description: CUDA toolkit version to install (only relevant if INSTALL_CUDA=true).

OPENCV_VERSION.description: OpenCV version to build from source (only relevant if INSTALL_OPENCV=true).
